args: _C="${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}"; _E="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; _P=$({ [ -n "$_E" ] && echo "$_E"; echo "$PWD/plugin"; echo "$PWD"; ls -dt "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache/claude-mem-local/claude-mem"/[0-9]*/ "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache/thedotmack/claude-mem"/[0-9]*/ "$_C/plugins/cache/thedotmack/claude-mem"/[0-9]*/ 2>/dev/null; echo "$_C/plugins/marketplaces/thedotmack/plugin"; } | while IFS= read -r _R; do [ -d "$_R/plugin/scripts" ] && _Q="$_R/plugin" || _Q="$_R"; [ -f "$_Q/scripts/mcp-server.cjs" ] && { echo "$_Q"; break; }; done); [ -n "$_P" ] || { echo "claude-mem: mcp server not found" >&2; exit 1; }; exec node "$_P/scripts/mcp-server.cjs"
